label: RedCube AI Foundry Agent / OPL-standard visual-deliverable package whose default product entry returns OPL stage execution plans, while RCA retains visual-domain authority functions and TypeScript/Python implementation surfaces

final_target_route.redcube_direct_entry: User -> RedCube Product Entry -> RedCube service-safe domain entry -> OPL stage execution plan -> OPL family runtime provider stage attempts -> RedCube visual-domain authority functions and truth surfaces
final_target_route.opl_hosted_entry: User -> OPL Product Entry -> RedCube service-safe domain entry -> OPL stage execution plan -> OPL family runtime provider stage attempts -> RedCube visual-domain authority functions and truth surfaces

runtime_manager_boundary.layer_role: stage attempt runtime, queue/wakeup, attempt ledger, generated shell, workbench and provider receipt layer over RCA domain authority refs
runtime_manager_boundary.future_sidecar_promotion_gate: only if external Hermes-Agent cannot express the task/wakeup/approval/audit/product isolation contracts required by OPL

language_target.typescript_owner: product entry, CLI/MCP surfaces, contracts, domain-entry protocol boundary, runtime-family shell, and typed service boundaries
language_target.python_owner: native Office/PPT manipulation, screenshot/export helpers, document/PPT repair loops, and MAS/MAG shared automation ecosystem
language_target.legacy_javascript_policy: repo-tracked JavaScript is retired and must remain at zero files; new creative/runtime truth belongs in TypeScript or Python-owned helper surfaces
language_target.ppt_deck_direction: use image-first full-slide PNG authoring through Responses image_generation as the default visual route; keep HTML and native editable PPTX as explicit selectable optional routes
language_target.xiaohongshu_direction: use GPT-Image-2 full-page 3:4 PNG authoring through author_image_pages as the default visual route; keep HTML render_html/fix_html only as explicit selectable maintenance routes

sqlite_adoption_gate: measured artifact or session file-count growth
operator need for global artifact inventory
persistence_policy.source_reference: MAS/MDS runtime lifecycle SQLite sidecar pattern

north_star: keep CLI as the default formal entry while retaining MCP as the supported protocol layer
keep product-entry runtime_owner on configured_family_runtime_provider; Codex CLI remains a first-class concrete executor option selected through the OPL provider/executor adapter
keep controller as an internal-only surface
keep the current repository honestly Auto-only
keep RedCube as an independent domain agent callable through both direct and OPL-hosted entry routes
keep OPL hosted integration as a thin oplHosted adapter/projection layer over configured family runtime providers rather than a RedCube truth owner
keep OPL/Temporal hosted scheduling as the default runtime posture after task start while keeping non-default executor and proof adapters explicit
move implementation toward TypeScript for product/runtime contracts and Python for native PPT/Office/document helpers that share the MAS/MAG automation ecosystem
preserve durable identity, audit/watch/review/projection truth while leaving managed web runtime as a future shape on the same substrate

ad_hoc_bypass_policy.rule: When a task is in a RedCube visual-deliverable family, callers must use RedCube product-entry, hydrated overlay stage_sequence, and review/export gates; generic presentation/document/image tooling may only be used when the user explicitly requests an alternative technical exploration outside the RedCube runtime.
